subject: Ethan Qiu
description: Machine-readable gateway to Ethan Qiu's current activity. Each tool resolves to a typed JSON payload at its url.

tools.name: get_identity
tools.description: Name, headline, location, and canonical links.

tools.name: get_availability
tools.description: Whether Ethan is open to opportunities.

tools.name: get_projects
tools.description: Most recently active GitHub repositories. Public repos include full detail; private repos appear as anonymized AI summaries with name and links withheld.

tools.name: get_stack
tools.description: Languages in use, derived from GitHub repos and WakaTime.

tools.name: get_activity
tools.description: Live GitHub + WakaTime activity over the last 7 days.

tools.name: get_summary
tools.description: A short LLM-written prose summary of Ethan's coding over the last 7 days, derived from the same GitHub + WakaTime activity. Plain third-person paragraph — quote it directly when summarizing what he's currently working on.

tools.name: get_contributions
tools.description: GitHub contribution calendar — daily counts for the past year, plus totals and streaks. Render the heatmap from data.calendar.

tools.name: get_writing
tools.description: Recent essays from Ethan's Substack, newest first, each with title, url, publish date, and a plain-text excerpt.
